name: Don't touch the thief!
overview: A drama adaptation of Jiro Akagawa's "Thief Series".  Junichi Konno, also known as Phantom Thief Dark Cat, is a world-class thief, and his wife is Mayumi, a detective in the Metropolitan Police Department's First Investigative Division.  A bumpy but friendly couple solves various cases.

trailers.title: 泥棒に手を出すな！予告編
